hooks.command: f=$(python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path") or "")'); case "$f" in *.cs) case "$f" in */Plugins/*) ;; *) dotnet format whitespace "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" --folder --include "${f#"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/}" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac;; esac
